characters.name: Aaron Schpelling
characters.description: Aaron Schpellingwas a scrapped character initially meant to appear in "Film Fest: Tears of a Clone". He was to be a German film producer who would giveJoanthe opportunity to make a national sitcom in Germany. In a scrapped alternate ending of "Film Fest: Tears of a Clone", Aaron Schpelling attended theClone High Film Festivaland was amazed byJoan'sindependent film, "The Truth Wears Sideburns". He gave her a job opportunity in Germany, where she could put her own creative talent toward making a sitcom. Joan accepted and created her own film noir-style sitcom calledShnitzel Haussen, which would play in the episode's ending tag.

characters.name: Abe Lincoln
characters.description: Abraham LincolnCurrentOriginalBabyFull NameAbraham LincolnAliasesAbeHonest AbeCaptain LavenderLincoln (by JFK)Age16(biologically)36(chronologically)FamilyAbe's Foster Dad(Foster Dad)Abe's Foster Mom(Foster Mom)Abe's Foster Uncle(Foster Uncle)Uncle Giuseppe(Foster Uncle)LoveBloody Mary(Ex-Girlfriend)Cleopatra(Ex-Girlfriend)Joan of Arc(Crush)JobStudentGenerationFirst GenerationCloneparentAbraham LincolnStatusAliveGenderMale♂HairBrunetteNationalityAmerican🇺🇸RaceEuropean AmericanReligionChristianitySexualityHeterosexualCatchphrase"Dinger!"First Appearance"Escape to Beer Mountain: a Rope of Sand"Voiced byWill Forte Abe Lincoln is shown to be very shy, awkward, reluctant and insecure about his abilities. He is a kind and friendly teenage boy, who spends most of his time with his friends,Joan of ArcandGandhi. He is smart and studious, always obeying the rules atClone High High Schooland avoiding getting into any trouble with the teachers. He always shows respect and patience toward others, like any red-blooded American would. However, he tends to do so even toward those who are mean and vain toward him. This makes him a bit of a "pushover", especially withCleopatra, to whom he is completely submissive. Abe can be described as weak-willed, rarely having the power to stand up for himself, even when he's being wronged. Abe will also easily cave into peer pressure, which can lead to him screwing himself over and getting into a few predicaments. However, through much trial and error, Abe stays vigilant and determined to get himself through these tough scenarios and reach the light at the end of the tunnel. Abe is also known for being comically oblivious to various things that happen to him, most notably Joan's crush on him. Although Joan drops numerous overt hints pointing to her infatuation with him, Abe fails to pick up on any of this. Abe also regularly fails to notice when he's being cheated on by Cleo or disrespected byJFK, as well as various other blatantly obvious social cues. This fuels his status as a pushover, as he fails to realize when he's being wronged, allowing Abe to make things worse for himself in social situations. To boot, Abe is very bad at decision-making, usually making stupidly poor choices that only lead to him digging himself even deeper into whatever hole he's gotten himself into. Abe's purpose in life is to live up to the name of his clonefather,The Original Abraham Lincoln, but this is, of course, going to be an incredibly rigorous journey for him. The original Abraham Lincoln was such an outstanding, legendary paragon in history, while he sees himself as just an average nobody. He doubts his ability to reach such a status in life but never truly gives up hope. When at the end of his robe, Abe looks to the Original Abraham Lincoln for moral and spiritual guidance, which never fails to give him the right advice for doing what he needs to do to succeed. Whenever Abe has one of these moments, he feels a true and deep connection with

characters.name: Abe's Foster Dad
characters.description: Abe's Foster DadFull NameAbe's Foster DadFamilyAbe's Foster Mom(wife)Abe Lincoln(foster son)LoveAbe's Foster Mom(wife)GenderMale♂HairBrunetteNationalityAmerican🇺🇸RaceCaucasianSexualityHeterosexualFirst Appearance"Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts"Last Appearance"Changes: The Big Prom: The Sex Romp: The Season Finale"Voiced byJoe Flaherty Abe's Foster Dadis the unnamed foster father ofAbe Lincolnand the husband ofAbe's Foster Mom. He first appeared in "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts". He is voiced by the lateJoe Flaherty. In "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts", he and hiswifefound raisins in Abe's pocket, leading them to believe he was smoking, a discussion they had at theschool'sPTA meeting. It was then they found out that Abe was addicted to raisins. Abe's father grounded him for his drug use and Abe ran away. Abe's father helped with buildingPrincipal Scudworth'sgiant fence. He, like all of the other parents, got addicted to raisins too, making it officially uncool, getting their kids to quit. Abe's Foster Dad is a satirical portrayal of the stereotypical 50's sitcom father trope. He is a family-valued, all-American man, who reads the newspaper and smokes a tobacco pipe. He is a selfless and caring foster father toAbe Lincoln, as seen in "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts", where he and hiswifeworked to keep Abe away fromraisins. He made it clear in that episode that he was doing this to help Abe, not himself, exhibiting how he puts the needs of others before his own. However, Abe's Foster Dad also exhibits some questionable behavior for an adult, as seen in "Changes: The Big Prom: The Sex Romp: The Season Finale", where he strongly encouraged Abe to favor getting laid over practicing abstinence, seeing the status of having sex as more important than staying safe. He also made some comments aboutCleo'sass being "built like the space shuttle", even though he knew she was underage. Another questionable choice he made happened at the end of "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts", where he got high on the very drugs he was keeping Abe away from. However, this was a successful attempt to get Abe away from those drugs since as an authority figure, his partaking in the trend made it officially uncool for the kids to continue partaking in. In general, despite his faults and bizarre behavior, Abe's Foster Dad is just a kind and loving foster father, who is looking out for his foster son and making sure he gives him the best in life.

characters.name: Abe's Foster Mom
characters.description: Abe's Foster MomFull NameAbe's Foster MomFamilyAbe's Foster Dad(husband)Abe Lincoln(foster son)LoveAbe's Foster Dad(husband)GenderFemale♀HairRedheadNationalityAmerican🇺🇸RaceCaucasianSexualityHeterosexualFirst Appearance"Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts"Last Appearance"Changes: The Big Prom: The Sex Romp: The Season Finale" Abe's Foster Momis the unnamedfoster motherofAbe Lincolnand the wife ofAbe's Foster Dad. She first appeared in "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts". In "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts", she and herhusbanddiscovered raisins inAbe'spocket, leading him to believe he was doing drugs. She and her husband complained about this at theschool'sPTA meeting, where it came about that Abe really was doing drugs. She helpedPrincipal Scudworthbuild a fence to put a stop to this. She and her husband then grounded Abe for doing drugs. Abe insulted her cooking and ran away from home. Like the other adults, she became a raisin addict too at the end of the episode, officially making it uncool with the teenagers, and convincing them to quit. Abe's Foster Mom has had very little screentime so not much is known about her personality. In general, she seems to fulfill the archetype of a stereotypical housewife and soccer mom from a teen drama, making her the complimentary counterpart to herhusband. She is a very loving and caring foster mom toAbeand she worries for his safety and well-being. She attendsPTAmeetings, where she expresses her fears and concerns regarding anything that could potentially endanger Abe, such asraisins, as seen in "Raisin the Stakes: A Rock Opera in Three Acts". As doting a mother as she is, Abe's Foster Mom is still a very joyous and fun-loving woman, who enjoys going to parties and dressing up, as seen in "Snowflake Day: A Very Special Holiday Special", where she dressed as a pirate and went toCleo'sSnowflake Day Party.

characters.name: Abe's Foster Uncle
characters.description: Abe's Foster UncleFamilyAbe Lincoln(foster nephew)StatusDeceasedGenderMale♂ Abe's Foster Uncleis the unnamed, unseen foster uncle ofAbe Lincoln. The most noteworthy thing about him is that he died a virgin. He was mentioned in "Cyranos: A Portmant-Opus". In "Cyranos: A Portmant-Opus",Abetold the tragic tale of his foster uncle, who lost his wiener in a tap dancing accident and died a virgin, due to smelling his own farts.

characters.name: Abe's Heart
characters.description: Abe's Heartis the anthropomorphic heart ofAbe Lincoln. It appeared in "Litter Kills: Litterally". In "Litter Kills: Litterally",Cleoproposed toAbe, that they go toTeen Sex Cove. Abe's Heart was shown inside of his body, screaming at the top of his lungs in panic. It screamed so loud, you could kind of hear it screaming even outside of Abe's body.

characters.name: Amelia Earhart
characters.description: Amelia EarhartFull NameAmelia Mary EarhartAliasesEarheartThisParty_37(FlipFlop)Age16FamilyUnknownLoveCharles LindberghJobStudentGenerationSecond GenerationCloneparentAmelia EarhartStatusAliveGenderFemale♀HairBlondeNationalityAmerican🇺🇸First AppearanceLet's Try This Again(FlipFlop)Money Can Buy Me Love: Stupid Is as Cupid Does(Physical Appearance) Amelia Earhartis a second generation student atClone High High Schooland 16-year old genetic clone of American aviatorAmelia Earhart. She officially debuts inMoney Can Buy Me Love: Stupid Is as Cupid Does. AFlipFlopaccount going by the name "EarheartThisParty_37" can be seen in "Let's Try This Again." It can be assumed that this account belongs to Amelia, as the username references her last name and the year she went missing while flying over the Pacific Ocean. She thinks cancel culture is "so cringe" and is presumably an alcoholic.
characters.personality_section: She thinks cancel culture is "so cringe" and is presumably an alcoholic.

characters.name: Ashley Angel
characters.description: Ashley AngelFull NameAshley Parker AngelAliasesAshley AngelAshley Angel From O-TownProfessor AshleyAge56JobSinger"College Professor"StatusAliveGenderMale♂HairBlondeRaceCaucasianFirst Appearance"Plane Crazy: Gate Expectations"Last Appearance"Changes: The Big Prom: The Sex Romp: The Season Finale"(cameo)Voiced byHimself Ashley Angelis a singer from the boy band, O-Town. He runs a trashy reality show calledAshley Angel From O-Town's Spring Break Dance Academy, which he touts as a prestigious college university, that he acts like the professor of. He appeared in the episode "Plane Crazy: Gate Expectations". In "Plane Crazy: Gate Expectations",Cleoapplied to be a dancer onAshley Angel From O-Town's Spring Break Dance Academy, so she leftAbeto go to Canada, where the show was filmed. Before she left, Abe gave her aLetterman Jacketto wear, symbolizing their love. When Abe watched the show, he saw Cleo grinding her ass up on Ashley Angel's pelvis. He was mad at her, not for cheating on him, but for not wearing his jacket.

characters.name: Austin Lane Crothers

Another unconfirmed clone,Bertolt Brecht, can be spotted one row in front of him.
